description: Provide either MADEONSOL_API_KEY (recommended, free tier 200 req/day at https://madeonsol.com/pricing) OR SVM_PRIVATE_KEY (pay-per-call via x402). At least one is required at runtime.

MADEONSOL_API_KEY.title: MadeOnSol API key (recommended)
MADEONSOL_API_KEY.description: Your MadeOnSol API key, starts with msk_. Free tier (200 req/day, no card) at https://madeonsol.com/pricing. Unlocks KOL feed, deployer alerts, alpha-wallet intel, multi-KOL coordination, first-touch scout signal, copy-trade rules, and the DEX firehose (ULTRA).

SVM_PRIVATE_KEY.title: Solana wallet private key (x402 alternative)
SVM_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Base58-encoded Solana private key for pay-per-call via x402 micropayments. Use this if you would rather not sign up - the server autopays per request from this wallet. Only needed when MADEONSOL_API_KEY is not set.

MADEONSOL_API_URL.description: MadeOnSol API base URL (defaults to https://madeonsol.com).
